Package com.sait.workshop05.models

package com.sait.workshop05.models
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.sait.workshop05
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Address
    Mutable address value for forms and REST payloads.
    AddressOption
    Address row for searchable ComboBox pickers with formatted labels in the editor.
    Bakery
    Bakery branch with nested address for location CRUD screens.
    BakeryOption
    Bakery id and display name for ComboBox value types.
    ConversationSummary
    One inbox row for the legacy messaging UI with partner id and last activity and unread count.
    Customer
    JavaFX customer row used by profile and customer admin screens.
    CustomerOption
    Customer selector row used by order and reference pickers.
    Employee
    Employee profile with JavaFX properties for table views and search filters and edit dialogs.
    Log
     
    Message
    JavaFX staff message row mapped from API UUID based payloads.
    Order
    JavaFX order row used by order list and checkout admin screens.
    OrderItem
    JavaFX order line item row for checkout and detail screens.
    OrderOption
    Order pick list entry.
    Payment
    JavaFX payment row used in order payment summaries.
    Product
    JavaFX product row used by catalog and specials screens.
    ProductSpecial
    Featured discount row for catalog specials.
    Province
    Canadian province or territory code with full name for address ComboBox rows.
    Review
    JavaFX review row for moderation and reporting views.
    Reward
    Loyalty ledger row for points earned on an order with display strings for tables.
    RewardTier
    Loyalty tier with point bounds and discount rate for staff CRUD.
    RewardTierOption
    Pick list row mapping tier id to label for reward tier ComboBox UIs.
    User
    Login user stub with JavaFX properties for session and compatibility with legacy integer user ids.
    UserOption
    Login account pick list row keyed by API user id with username as the visible label.
